acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode.
alkylation reagent: alkylated for 30 min in the dark with 50 mM iodoacetamide (IAA)
alkylation concentration: alkylated for 30 min in the dark with 50 mM iodoacetamide (IAA)
fragmentation method: The top N (most intense) ions per scan were fragmented by electron transfer dissociation (ETD)
instrument: conducted on a Dionex Ultimate 3000 coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: The Advion TriVersa NanoMate (Advion Ltd., Harlow, United Kingdom) was used as the nanospray interface
labeling: Samples were reconstituted in an aqueous solution of 3% acetonitrile (ACN) and 1% formic acid (FA) and injected to the LC-MS/MS system.
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 45 min at 56 °C
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 45 min at 56 °C
